title: Siemens India Global Group is Hiring: Full Stack Developer (Principal)

jsonLd.title: Siemens India Global Group is Hiring: Full Stack Developer (Principal)
jsonLd.description:
Siemens India Global Group, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Full Stack Developer for our Mumbai operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About Siemens India Global Group:
Siemens India Global Group is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions
• Optimize application performance and ensure high availability
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Write and execute unit tests and integration tests
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in AWS
• Proficiency in Go
• Proficiency in Kubernetes
• Proficiency in Machine Learning
• Proficiency in Microservices
• Proficiency in React
• Proficiency in Python
• Proficiency in JavaScript

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Learning & development budget
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Mumbai, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Siemens India Global Group!
